steps.title: Identify the list structure
steps.content: The blank appears before the verb welded and must contain two past participles that, together with welded, form a simple series of three parallel actions describing what was done to the sculptures. In a series, each item is separated by a comma.

steps.title: Apply the series comma rule
steps.content: Choice B supplies the required commas after cut and bent and includes the conjunction and, giving the correct pattern cut, bent, and welded. The other choices either add an unnecessary comma after and, replace a needed comma with a semicolon, or omit the comma after cut, all violating the series rule. That matches choice B — B is correct.
